events.title: Mná Mná Live Jazz at Bridge St Bar
events.description: Jazz performance by Mná Mná, four women from Westport playing jazz standards, originals, and classics. May 15, 8:30 PM, Bridge St Bar, Castlebar.
events.post_text: Mná Mná Next Gig bridge street (upstairs) Castlebar Friday May 15 th 8.30 pm. Follow link below for tickets/donations at Eventbrite We are "Mná Mná" - 4 women from the Westport area who have got together to play jazz - voice, double bass, soxophone and piano.
